titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Muawiyah Ibn Hakim
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Muawiyah Ibn Hakim

segments: ه عن معاوية بن حكيم فقد رويته عن أبي، و محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن معاوية بن حكيم. و رويته عن محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنه- عن محمّد بن الحسن الصفّار، عن معاوية بن حكيم‌.
arabic.text: ه عن معاوية بن حكيم فقد رويته عن أبي، و محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن معاوية بن حكيم. و رويته عن محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنه- عن محمّد بن الحسن الصفّار، عن معاوية بن حكيم‌.

segments: And whatever is narrated from Muawiyah ibn Hakim, I have narrated it from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them - from Saʿd ibn Abdullah, from Muawiyah ibn Hakim. And I have also narrated it from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan Al-Ṣaffar, from Muawiyah ibn Hakim.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: And whatever is narrated from Muawiyah ibn Hakim, I have narrated it from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them - from Saʿd ibn Abdullah, from Muawiyah ibn Hakim. And I have also narrated it from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan Al-Ṣaffar, from Muawiyah ibn Hakim.
